name: Lost in Visual Translation: A VLM-Assisted Perceptual-Semantic Coherence Framework for EEG-to-Image Reconstruction
summary: arXiv:2607.12364v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: EEG-to-image evaluation should distinguish visual fidelity from recoverable meaning. Yet EEG-derived reconstructions are blurry, distorted, and low...
description: arXiv:2607.12364v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: EEG-to-image evaluation should distinguish visual fidelity from recoverable meaning. Yet EEG-derived reconstructions are blurry, distorted, and low-detail, causing SSIM, LPIPS, and CLIP to penalize semantically recoverable outputs or reward plausible but incorrect ones. We analyze 6,855 ground-truth/reconstruction pairs from ATM, ENIGMA, BrainVi...
author: Sukriti Tiwari, BHVSP Subrahmanyam, Nidhi Goyal, Sai Amrit Patnaik
